channel.title: Actix on rena mice.
channel.description: Recent content in Actix on rena mice.

item.title: Password Generator: Backend
item.description: For quite a while now, I wanted to learn Rust. I tried the online book, but I haven’t finished it till now, instead, after learning what I thought to be enough basics, I recreated my old terminal program into this web-based API just to see if I can use it or not. Rust actually provides a code snippet for this in their cookbook. There is even a crate for this exact purpose, and their code snippet is far better than mine.
